C-REMOVE-RTK-RECOMMENDATIONS.Summary: Remove all RTK (rtk-ai/rtk CLI proxy) recommendations and mentions from the codebase and README.
C-REMOVE-RTK-RECOMMENDATIONS.Problem: RTK is currently recommended in the interactive vvoc init flow and documented in README as a token-saving helper. In practice RTK proxies and wraps common developer commands, which alters the shape of their output. LLM-driven sessions therefore receive responses they do not expect, get confused, and start trying to work around RTK instead of completing the intended work. This makes the recommendation net-negative and it should be removed.

Goals.Goal: Remove the RTK install recommendation from the interactive vvoc init outro in src/commands/init.ts, reducing the outro to a single success message.
Remove the entire Optional: RTK section from README.md, including the claim that the init flow recommends it.
Ensure no project-authored RTK references (links, install commands, recommendations) remain in source or documentation.

NonGoals.NonGoal: Do not replace RTK with an alternative token-saving tool recommendation.
Do not change any other vvoc init behavior or outro structure beyond removing the RTK block.
Do not add RTK-detection, RTK-blocking, or uninstall guidance logic.

AcceptanceCriteria.Criterion: The interactive vvoc init outro no longer recommends RTK or shows RTK install commands; the outro is reduced to the single success message.
README.md no longer contains an Optional: RTK section or any rtk-ai/rtk link, install command, or recommendation.
A repository-wide search for RTK references yields no project-authored mentions, ignoring transitive dependencies recorded in bun.lock.
CHANGELOG.md records that the harmful RTK recommendation was removed.
typecheck, lint, format check, bun test, and GRACE lint all pass.

VerificationIntent.ExpectedEvidence: A repo-wide search for RTK shows no project-authored references (bun.lock transitive deps excluded); the init outro is reduced to the success message; README has no RTK section; typecheck, lint, format, tests, and GRACE lint pass.

Assumptions.Assumption: RTK is removed outright and is not replaced by another recommendation.
The init outro after removal is the single line success message with no new guidance added.
No tests currently assert on the RTK outro text, so no test removal or rewrite is required.
README is project documentation and is not modeled as a separate graph module anchor; it is tracked through acceptance criteria, consistent with prior change bundles.
